refs.purpose: Validate the emitted draft against draft-contract rules (sentinel form, topology, _plan_* placement) before handing off.
refs.trigger: After writing or modifying the draft workflow file.
refs.verification: Cast the skill, run on a representative paper-derived summary, confirm draft-validate diagnostics route back.

refs.purpose: Use corpus-grounded collection pattern guidance for unresolved skeleton steps.
refs.trigger: When adding TODO steps for collection cleanup, reshaping, relabeling, identifier synchronization, or collection-tabular bridges.

refs.purpose: Use corpus-grounded tabular pattern guidance for unresolved skeleton steps.
refs.trigger: When adding TODO steps for tabular filtering, projection, joins, aggregation, text-processing recipes, or tabular-collection bridges.

refs.purpose: Preserve Galaxy collection typing and map-over/reduction semantics in the gxformat2 skeleton.
refs.trigger: When creating workflow inputs, outputs, and placeholder connections involving collections.

refs.purpose: Respect the handoff from the combined paper-to-Galaxy design brief to the gxformat2 skeleton.
refs.trigger: When translating abstract nodes, unresolved tool needs, and placeholder transformations into template TODOs.
refs.verification: Promote after two worked paper-to-Galaxy templates preserve the design-brief/template split without schema changes.

refs.purpose: Emit the gxformat2 draft superset: TODO tool_id, optional tool_state / tool_shed_repository, and per-step _plan_state / _plan_context planning fields.
refs.verification: Promote after a downstream per-step implementation Mold consumes _plan_state and _plan_context without round-tripping back through the source summary.

refs.purpose: Choose stable workflow input/output labels, testable checkpoint outputs, and fixture-compatible workflow interfaces while drafting the skeleton.
refs.trigger: When the template decides workflow inputs, workflow outputs, promoted checkpoints, or collection output identifiers that future tests will need to address.

produces.description: gxformat2 draft (see [[galaxy-workflow-draft-format]]): topology fully resolved (workflow inputs, outputs, step set, edges); tool_id / tool_state / tool_shed_repository and wrapper-determined port names may be TODO with free-text _plan_state / _plan_context / _plan_in / _plan_out per step for later implementation Molds.

consumes.description: Paper summary emitted by [[summarize-paper]]; consulted while emitting placeholder steps.
Combined Galaxy design brief from [[paper-summary-to-galaxy-design]] that pins interface and data-flow choices.
Structural diff guidance from [[compare-against-iwc-exemplar]] (run on the design brief); steers the skeleton toward IWC-aligned structure before per-step authoring.
